'''tayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bicubically|bicubically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-y-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bicubically|bicubically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tayate|tayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tayatesher|tayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tayatesherĂ«m|tayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tayatero|tayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tayateshĂ«|tayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tayateshĂ«m|tayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitayatero|gokitayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitayateshĂ«|gokitayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitayateshĂ«m|gokitayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotayankerom|gotayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotayankeshĂ«|gotayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotayankeshĂ«m|gotayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotayankeya|gotayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tayaterom|tayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tayatemu|tayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tayateya|tayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitayaterom|gokitayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitayatemu|gokitayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitayateya|gokitayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:tayayate|tayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tayayatesher|tayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tayayatesherĂ«m|tayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tayayatero|tayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tayayateshĂ«|tayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tayayateshĂ«m|tayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitayayatero|gokitayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitayayateshĂ«|gokitayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitayayateshĂ«m|gokitayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotayayankerom|gotayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotayayankeshĂ«|gotayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotayayankeshĂ«m|gotayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotayayankeya|gotayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tayayaterom|tayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tayayatemu|tayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tayayateya|tayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitayayaterom|gokitayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitayayatemu|gokitayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitayayateya|gokitayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠyĂŠte|tĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠyĂŠtesher|tĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠyĂŠtero|tĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠyĂŠtero|gokitĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠyĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠyĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠyĂŠterom|tĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠyĂŠtemu|tĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠyĂŠteya|tĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠyĂŠterom|gokitĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠyĂŠteya|gokitĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:tafyafte|tafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafyaftesher|tafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafyaftesherĂ«m|tafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafyaftero|tafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafyafteshĂ«|tafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafyafteshĂ«m|tafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafyaftero|gokitafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafyafteshĂ«|gokitafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafyafteshĂ«m|gokitafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafyafnkerom|gotafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafyafnkeshĂ«|gotafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafyafnkeshĂ«m|gotafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafyafnkeya|gotafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafyafterom|tafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafyaftemu|tafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafyafteya|tafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafyafterom|gokitafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafyaftemu|gokitafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafyafteya|gokitafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
